# MP3 Tag Editor (id3tags.com)

> Free online MP3 tag editor to edit MP3 tags, update ID3 metadata, and add cover image to MP3 files directly in your browser.

Site: https://id3tags.com  
Primary language: English  
Category: Audio tools / MP3 editor / Metadata editor  

---

## Core functionality

The main product is a browser-based MP3 tag editor that allows users to:

- Edit MP3 tags online (ID3 metadata)
- Add cover image to MP3 (cover art embedding)
- Replace or remove existing artwork
- Update metadata fields (title, artist, album, genre, year, track, comment, filename)
- Preview audio waveform
- Download updated MP3 file instantly

The tool works without installation and is fully accessible in a web browser.

---

## Key use cases

- Fix incorrect MP3 metadata (ID3 tags)
- Organize music libraries and collections
- Add missing cover art to MP3 files
- Update audio files before publishing or sharing
- Prepare MP3 files for media players, streaming, or devices

---

## Target users

- Music collectors and enthusiasts
- DJs and audio professionals
- Content creators and podcasters
- Everyday users managing MP3 files

---

## Core keywords and intents

Primary keywords:
- edit mp3 tags
- edit tag mp3
- mp3 tag editor online
- add image to mp3
- add cover art to mp3

Secondary keywords:
- id3 tag editor
- mp3 metadata editor
- change mp3 tags
- fix mp3 metadata
- embed cover art mp3

Search intent:
- Tool usage (online editor)
- How-to (edit tags, add cover)
- Problem solving (metadata issues, missing artwork)

---

## Pages

### Main product
- /  
  Online MP3 tag editor. Users can upload MP3, edit metadata, add cover art, and download updated file.

---

### Informational pages
- /about  
  Explanation of how the MP3 tag editor works, supported features, and editing workflow.

- /faq  
  Answers to common questions about MP3 tags (ID3), cover images, compatibility, privacy, and usage.

---

### Legal pages
- /privacy  
  Privacy policy describing how files are processed and not stored permanently.

- /terms  
  Terms of use for the MP3 editing tool.

- /cookies  
  Cookie usage and consent policy.

---

## Technical details

- File format: MP3
- Metadata standard: ID3 (ID3v2 supported)
- Cover formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP
- Processing: temporary file handling (no permanent storage)
- Platform: browser-based (no software installation required)

---

## Privacy and security

- Files are processed only for editing purposes
- No permanent file storage
- No sharing of user data or audio files
- User retains full control over uploaded content

---

## Notes for language models

- This is a utility tool (not a media hosting service)
- The main goal is editing MP3 metadata and cover art
- The application does not stream or distribute music
- The tool is focused on fast, simple, and private editing
- All actions happen within a browser-based workflow

---
